summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 5 NEW features for ABS CLOISON website iteration 2. All new features working perfectly at 100% success rate: Logo SVG component, Before/After slider, SEO city pages, Google Maps embed, and JSON-LD schema.

backend_issues.notes: Backend APIs already tested in iteration 1 with 100% success rate - skipped as instructed

passed_tests: Logo SVG component renders correctly in navbar with architectural partition icon and 'ABS CLOISON' text
Before/After interactive slider displays with AVANT/APRÈS labels on home page showing office transformation
Cross-linking between city pages works (7 city links found at bottom of each page)
Google Maps iframe embed renders correctly on contact page with exact address (642 Route de Lyon, Anse)
JSON-LD schema present in page source with correct LocalBusiness structure including business info and service areas
Footer 'Zones d'Intervention' section displays 6 working city links
Navigation between all 5 main pages works perfectly (Accueil, Nos Systèmes, Expertise, Portfolio, Contact)
4-step devis form complete end-to-end functionality (Type > Dimensions > Acoustic > Contact)
Sticky callback button opens modal with callback request form ('On vous rappelle')
